title: Blox AI /var/log/fula/ai-actions.jsonl line shape
description: Phase 10 contract. Container appends one JSON object per line to /var/log/fula/ai-actions.jsonl for EVERY /execute-action request, including validation failures. Persistent across reboots so reboot-loop forensics survive. Per Gemini pre-impl HIGH: container has only O_APPEND access (no truncate/delete) to prevent a compromised executor from cleaning up its tracks. Rotate at 50 MB matching Phase 1's events.jsonl convention.

ts.description: When the executor finished processing (success, failure, or rejection).

request_id.description: Per-request UUID, distinct from action_id. Allows correlating the audit line with container logs + SSE delivery.

action_id.description: Matches the action_id from the recommended_action SSE event.

args.description: Action args as submitted. Container MUST sanitize for log-injection (escape/forbid CR/LF) and reject canonical-JSON serialization > 1024 bytes. Per Gemini + Codex post-impl HIGH: structural limits at schema time (maxProperties:20, propertyNames pattern) as defense-in-depth before container's runtime sanitization.

token_expires_at.description: Token's expires_at field (from approval_token decode). Optional — present only when token was decodable.

security_code_required.description: True for tier-3 actions, false otherwise.

security_code_valid.description: Null when not required, true/false when checked. NEVER log the actual code value.

executed.description: True iff the executor ran subprocess.run for the action. False for any rejection (whitelist, args, token, security_code).

rejected_reason.description: Empty string when executed=true. One of the enum values when executed=false. Codex pre-impl MEDIUM-HIGH for forensic completeness.

stdout_excerpt.description: Truncated to 2048 bytes (Gemini HIGH: log-injection + disk-exhaustion mitigation).

duration_ms.description: Total request time end-to-end, including validation and execution. 0 for instant rejections.

error.description: Human-readable description of any failure (validation or execution). Don't include secrets or full tokens.

executor_version.description: Container's executor module version (e.g. '0.1.0' or git short-sha). Codex pre-impl MEDIUM-HIGH: drift detection across container upgrades.

whitelist_hash.description: sha256 of action_whitelist.json at execute time (HEX). Lets a forensic review correlate an audit line with the EXACT whitelist that was active. Codex pre-impl MEDIUM-HIGH.

allOf.description: Codex post-impl MEDIUM-HIGH: conditional invariant — executed=true MUST have empty rejected_reason AND a result block AND no error.
Codex post-impl MEDIUM-HIGH: executed=false MUST have non-empty rejected_reason AND no result block.
tier=2 must NOT have security_code_valid=true (no code needed for tier 2). It can be null (not required) or false (executor sanity check).
